office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: A business and community leader emphasizing fiscal accountability faces an incumbent civil-rights attorney with a legislative focus on justice reform and immigrant protections.

candidates.summary: Ilgen is a business and community leader focused on affordability, fiscal responsibility, measurement, and collaborative problem solving.
highlights: Emphasizes affordability across housing, health care, child care, schools, utilities, and ferries [S2]
Calls for fiscal responsibility, measurement, and accountability [S2]

spending.basis: She explicitly calls for fiscal responsibility, measurement, and accountability.

experience.basis: She brings extensive business and community partnership experience but no documented elected record.

candidates.summary: Simmons is an incumbent representative and civil-rights attorney whose official work emphasizes justice reform and protections for immigrants.
highlights: Brings an incumbent legislative and civil-rights-law record [S2]
Official work emphasizes criminal-justice reform and immigrant-community protections [S2]

experience.basis: She is an incumbent representative with an official legislative record.

immigration.basis: Her official legislative work emphasizes protections for immigrant communities.
